steps.t: Haldirith is an Elf-camp located in the northern area of Thinglad. Alfrohir has brought you from Lothlórien to Thinglad along the Great River, and thi…
The Fellowship passed south along the river, and Fimloth thinks if you seek news of your friends you should follow the river-bank south looking for si…
The Fellowship passed south along the river, and Fimloth thinks if you seek news of your friends you should follow the river-bank south looking for si…
You have been following the river south in search of signs of the Fellowship's passage.
Fimloth is at Haldirith. You should return to Fimloth at Haldirith and give her the Orc arrow and news of the slain scout you discovered.
Fimloth is at Haldirith in Thinglad. You have defeated many Orcs and should return to Fimloth at Haldirith in Thinglad.
Nona is at Haldirith, in Thinglad. Nona wishes to speak with you.
